title: Projects
noProjects: No projects yet. Add one above to get started.

fields.name: Name
fields.internalProjectNoCustomer: Internal projects don't have a customer.
fields.isInternalHint: Your own work — never appears on an invoice and has no customer. Examples: your own product, R&D, ops.
fields.isInternalBadgeHint: Manage in the Classification panel below.
fields.defaultBillableHint: Drives the default for new time entries. Per-entry override still works for the one-off case.
fields.githubRepoHint: Use the short form (e.g. theshyre/shyre) or paste a full GitHub URL — both work. A bare #123 in a time-entry description then resolves to this repo.
fields.jiraProjectKeyHint: Used to build issue URLs like {base}/browse/{key}-123.
fields.invoiceCodeHint: Short uppercase prefix shown in square brackets on each invoice line item — e.g. [PC-ITOPS]. Letters, digits, and hyphens; up to 16 chars.
fields.requireTimestampsHint: Off: entries need only a date and duration (e.g. 3:15). On: every entry must have explicit start and end times.
fields.parentProjectHint: Pick a parent to make this a sub-project under it. Sub-projects share the same customer and team as their parent and roll up onto the parent's totals.
fields.parentProjectLockedHasChildren: This project has its own sub-projects. Detach them first to re-parent it.
fields.parentInheritedHint: Filled from parent — edit any field to override.
fields.applyParentSettingsConfirm: Overwrite this project's rate, repo, Jira key, invoice code, billable default, and timestamps with {name}'s current values? You can still edit any field afterwards.

classification.heading: Classification
classification.internalDescription: This is an internal project — your own work. It has no customer and never appears on an invoice.
classification.externalDescription: This is client work. Time logged here can be invoiced to the customer.
classification.confirmMakeInternal: Convert this project to internal? Effects:

makeInternalEffect.invoices: Future entries can't be added to invoices.

classification.confirmMakeClient: Pick a customer to convert this to client work. Existing time entries are unaffected — bulk-flip them to billable separately if you want to invoice the back catalog.
classification.confirmApplyBillableTrue: Set every unbilled, non-trashed time entry on this project to billable=true. Already-invoiced entries are skipped (their billable flag is locked to the invoice).
classification.confirmApplyBillableFalse: Set every unbilled, non-trashed time entry on this project to billable=false. Already-invoiced entries are skipped (their billable flag is locked to the invoice).
classification.applyBillableSkipsInvoiced: Entries on a non-void invoice keep their existing billable flag — change them through the invoice itself.

timeEntries.title: Time Entries
timeEntries.noEntries: No time entries yet for this project.

projectCategories.title: Categories
projectCategories.baseSetPreviewPending: Save to load the selected set's categories.
projectCategories.enableTitle: Need one-off categories for this project?
projectCategories.enableHint: Anything you add here stacks on top of the base set — users pick from both.
projectCategories.emptyHint: Add your first project-specific category below.
projectCategories.duplicateWarning: "{name}" already exists in the base set. Rename it to avoid confusion in the picker.

bulkSelectHint: Select rows to archive in bulk
bulkArchivedToast: {count, plural, one {1 project archived} other {# projects archived}}
bulkRestoredToast: {count, plural, one {1 project restored} other {# projects restored}}
bulkSwitchSet: {count, plural, one {Switch category set} other {Switch category set on #}}
bulkSwitchSetListboxAria: Pick a category set to apply
bulkSwitchSetToast: Category set on {count, plural, one {1 project} other {# projects}} set to {name}

history.title: Edit history
history.description: Every change to this project's settings is captured here. Owner / admin only — used for dispute resolution and "who set this on March 12?" questions.
history.empty: No changes recorded yet — this project hasn't been edited since the audit trail came online.
history.notAdmin: Project history is visible to owner / admin only.
